text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hitching a ride with the fisherman Hishi Akebono befriended,
we finally set foot on this... accursed island.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! That sun feels so good! The perfect day for seaweed
harvesting!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
By the way... That's a lot of luggage, Trainer! What exactly did you
bring?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
A bunch of water, a fire striker... Ah, you even brought an
encyclopedia of edible plants!
choice_data_list: Today will not end like last time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I almost forgot how we met. I found you collapsed in this very
area!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That sure did surprise me. If you hadn't woken up, I'm not sure what I
would've done.
choice_data_list:
I thought a goddess had come to save me at
first.

I thought a goddess had come to save me at
first.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Oh, you charmer, you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if the goddess you saw is as big as I am. I guess I'll have to
ask around to see if anyone else has spotted a giant goddess.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, put down that stuff and... let's get going! I wanna harvest
lots and lots of kombu seaweed!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The fisherman said we could grab some fish while we're at it! Trainer,
you guard our baskets so the birds don't steal anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono takes off for the beaches, and I'm left in the shade to
watch over our stuff. Before I know it, two hours have gone by...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Sorry for the wait!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I found some really big shellfish and fish! With these, I can make us
some lunch!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's what I brought this big earthen pot for! I'm sure it'll make it
eeextra good!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ah, no, Trainer, you can sit back and relax! You must be tired, right?
Keeping watch can really wear you out.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Just wait a teeeensy bit longer. A good, hearty meal will fix you right
up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono quickly begins preparing our lunch. Looks like there's
nothing for me to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But I don't exactly want to just stand around...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grabbing my encyclopedia of plants, I make my way farther into the
island in search of ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: No matter how much I search, I can't seem to find anything edible...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I did happen upon some mushrooms, but picking wild mushrooms as
an amateur would be asking for trouble.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Traaainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: There you are! Thank goodness! What happened? Did you get lost?
choice_data_list: No, I was looking for ingredients...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah, wait, are you that hungry?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, don't you worry! I'm not just making hot pot. I'm making some
skewers and grilled fish too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: It's almost done, so just wait a liiiittle bit longer, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A feast fit for a sumo wrestler is laid out before me. Fish and
vegetable skewers, hot pot... there's even rice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every dish makes my taste buds sing with joy. I know it's far too much
for just the two of us, but my hands won't stop reaching for another
helping.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Was it good?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm glad you liked it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I love seeing you eat with that big smile on your face. It makes me
feel all warm and fuzzy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I sure am glad you became my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
If you get hungry again, just let me know, okay? I'll whip up
something in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono smiles as she gazes at me, content with her work.
While she seems to do it because she enjoys it, I can't help but want
to return the favor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right then and there, I decide to treat her to some good food at the
next opportunity.
